Case studies

Real brands, real numbers

No vanity metrics. Every case below is a client who let us show the actual data.

Instagram · NL / FR / EU

Vigor & Sage

3
Instagram accounts
1,986
Combined followers
1,622
Combined posts
NL/FR/EU
Markets

Vigor & Sage needed one coherent brand voice across three Instagram accounts — Netherlands, France and a broader Europe account — serving Dutch, French and international EU audiences without the content feeling translated.

We built a shared content core with market-specific execution layers.

  • One master content calendar, localized per market
  • Tone-of-voice guide adapted for NL and FR nuance
  • Visual system consistent across all three accounts
  • Carousel-first format for written storytelling
  • Reels for product and behind-the-scenes content
  • Stories series minimum 5 slides per topic
  • 946 posts and 1,060 followers on the Europe account alone
  • 421 posts / 501 followers (NL) and 255 posts / 425 followers (France)
  • 1,986 combined followers and 1,622 combined posts across all three accounts
  • All three accounts cross-follow each other — one recognisable brand, not three disconnected pages
Vigor & Sage — multilingual Instagram system
Three accounts, one brand

Netherlands — 421 posts, 501 followers

NL feed — consistent visual system

France — 255 posts, 425 followers

France feed — same voice, French copy

Europe — 946 posts, 1,060 followers

Europe feed — English-language hub account

Let’s talk about your brand →
LinkedIn · Personal brand

Ax Lindholm

755,793
Impressions / 365 days
+3,757%
YoY growth
2,784
Followers
5,117
Engagements

Ax Lindholm, Founder Advisor & Venture Architect at InspireXchange and Masterschool, needed a LinkedIn presence that reflected the weight of his work — not another generic "thought leader" feed.

We repositioned his personal brand around a specific point of view: most startups don’t need funding, they need a reality check.

  • Content pillars built from his actual expertise, not generic advice
  • Consistent posting rhythm with strategic hooks
  • Profile and About section rewritten around one sharp thesis, not a resume

Three posts carried most of the weight — proof that a sharp point of view beats volume.

  • “Something big is quietly happening in venture capital” — 105K impressions, 492 engagements
  • “Jeff Bezos just did a little plot twist…” — 75K impressions, 74 engagements
  • “Old man post” on founder generations — 71K impressions, 261 engagements
  • 755,793 impressions over 365 days — up 3,757% year over year
  • 2,784 followers — up 132% year over year
  • 5,117 social engagements (3,191 reactions, 661 comments, 1,089 saves, 152 LinkedIn sends)
  • 850 link visits driven directly from posts
  • Audience: 30% companies of 2–10 people, 28% senior, 13% founders, concentrated in Rotterdam & The Hague
Ax Lindholm — Founder Advisor & Venture Architect, InspireXchange · Masterschool
Straight from LinkedIn Analytics

Weekly snapshot — 35,529 impressions (+600.7%/7d), 2,784 followers

365-day impressions — 755,793 total, +3,757% year over year

Follower growth — 2,784 total, +132% year over year

Engagement breakdown — 5,117 social engagements, 850 link visits

Top performing posts — up to 105K impressions on a single post

Instagram · Tax & business consulting

Azarova Consulting

26,351
Views / 30 days
1,449
Interactions
1,524
Followers
164
Posts published

Azarova Consulting — Katerina Azarova’s tax consulting practice for NL/EU business owners (incorporation through to selling a business) — needed an Instagram presence that could sustain consistent growth without her personally producing content daily.

We built a repeatable content system instead of one-off posts.

  • 30-day content calendar with defined formats
  • Templates for recurring content types
  • Engagement-first captions and hooks
  • 164 posts published across the period
  • Mix of carousels, Reels and Stories
  • Consistent visual identity across all formats
  • 26,351 views (May 31 – Jun 29)
  • 1,449 interactions
  • 1,524 followers, +34 new
  • 3,412 accounts reached, up 49.9%
  • 164 posts published
Azarova Consulting — Katerina Azarova, Tax Consultant NL/EU · on-call CFO
Straight from the account — May 31 – Jun 29

Profile — 1,524 followers, 434 posts

Feed — consistent format, real per-post views

Dashboard — 26.4K views, 1.4K interactions, +34 followers

Views breakdown — 26,351 total, 3,412 accounts reached (+49.9%)

Interactions breakdown — 1,449 total, Stories 65% · Reels 29.6% · Posts 5.4%
